title: Julie Baby
description: Julie Baby is hungry. So hungry she might eat someone. A former star swimmer, she spends her days empty and alone, thinking about her past and missing her brother. That is until her new man gives her the name ‘Julie Baby’. Equipped with a new name and identity, she is determined to feel full again - no matter what it takes. Julie Baby is the story of obsession, loss and just how far we’ll go to feel whole.

venue.name: Upstairs @ The Colly
venue.address: Colonnade Bar, 10 New Road, East Sussex
